title: 'No dead ends': What the Dutch can teach us about tackling youth unemployment
summary_full: The Netherlands has one of the world's lowest rates of 16 to 24-year-olds not in education, employment or training.
summary_public: The Netherlands has one of the world's lowest rates of 16 to 24-year-olds not in education, employment or training.
